10

Most often studied features are cell phenotype presence and proportion
 Presence of cancer cells or precursors

Proportion is usually analyzed as ordinal categories (none/low/high)
 For example: proportion of Ki-67+ cells or tumor infiltrating lymphocytes (TIL)

25/05/2025

Färkkilä Lab virtual TMA project / Fernando Perez & Antti Toivanen

11

Literature review findings

TMA core picking by pathologists’ annotations seems to outperform random picking

Measures of quality vary by a lot
Pearson correlation
Spearman rank correlation
Kappa-statistics
Kruskal-Wallis
Mann-Whitney
Kullback-Leibler
Bland-Altman
and many more
